DITCD.COM.title: Dark Side Of The Ring
DITCD.COM.about:
"WHENEVER I RELEASE A PROJECT ON THE DATE OF ITS RELEASE I USUALLY LIKE TO HIT THE STUDIO AND BEGIN WORKING ON THE NEXT PROJECT AS A WAY TO STAY CREATIVE AND NOT REST ON MY LAURELS. AFTER RELEASING JXLLYB WITH WULVERINE I WAS INSPIRED TO MAKE SOME NEW SHIT. WRITTEN AND RECORDED IN TWO DAYS, DARK SIDE OF THE RING IS A MIXTAPE OF ME ROCKING ON CONTEMPORARY UNDERGROUND BEATS INSTEAD OF 90’S/EARLY 2000S INSTRUMENTALS. ONLY ORIGINAL SONG IS PRODUCED BY DOMINICAN KEV, 3 REMIXES (SHOUT OUT TO SERF, CHOPSTIX MURPHY and TEK BEATS) . RELEASING EXCLUSIVELY WITH @ditcddotcom"
-Action Figure

DITCD.COM.title: Ghosts Of Rockingham
DITCD.COM.about:
Digital Available Here:
bravenous1.bandcamp.com/album/ghosts-of-rockingham
It only takes one listen of this new outing from bRAVENOUS to know that ghosts not only exist, but also walk among us in Rockingham, Nova Scotia. An immensely personal project from the accomplished emcee, this 15-track LP takes listeners into distant memories, times and places with a wood paneled-van that doubles as a DeLorean time machine. Features include a talented lineup that join bRAVENOUS in waxing nostalgic and scratches that cut deep from Uncle Fester.
DITCD.COM.credits:
released March 15, 2024
All Mixing, mastering and Cuts by Uncle Fester

DITCD.COM.title: Guerilla Don
DITCD.COM.about:
Digital Available Here:
kainesosa.bandcamp.com/album/guerilla-don
"Guerilla Don". The 2nd official studio album from Kaine Sosa. Executed in classic rap fashion with a gritty Intro, & Outro, as well as a look into Kaine Sosa's real life & experiences! The record also includes not one, but Two secret tracks after the Outro convincingly gives the impression that the album is over. A true classic, & masterpiece.

DITCD.COM.title: HERE'S THE THING
DITCD.COM.about:
Around the turn of the millennium, davepsy's Oddities crew frequented the Stylistik Endeavors radio show on CKLN in Toronto, while Circle Research (Nineteen Ninety Nix's crew) launched their own show shortly after. Asicks invited the Oddities to join, and over time, everyone became family, guesting on each other's projects, playing shows, and eventually Circle Research became the Oddities' de-facto DJs. This collaboration culminated in the cross-country Weird Science tour.
A couple of decades later, Big Tweeze presented davepsy with a folder of beats, leading davepsy to write to Nineteen Ninety Nix's production for the first time. After completing "triptych," an EP plan emerged. Oddities fans might enjoy "Snüzz Butt" for a dose of nostalgia or some traditional braggadocio, with contributions from Grafh & Casual. Alternatively, listeners can simply enjoy the danceable rhythms. This project is a testament to 25 years of friendship.
credits
released August 1, 2025
you are appreciated:
Aya, Amber J, Édi J Rose, Casual, Grafh, Cookiez, Book, Gil Masuda, Michelle Los, Love Touch Records, MC Abdominal, Big Tweeze, Joey G, Paul Rygier, JSN JNS, Sny-Whip, J-StaRRRrrr!!!, Wysper, Paul Andre, Moka Only, Jeff Spec, Ishkan, Sweet G, Birdapres, Dr. j, Maylee Todd, Stylus, Gabriel Teodros, the Moores, Toronto. Love to all OG crews and alumni, including Circle Research, The Precious Lo’s, Oddities/Dynasty-plus, Monolith, Notes to Self/BBRC, City Planners, Everybody Soul, Urbnet, DITCD, and the list goes…
Get the digital or the cassette here:
davepsy-urbnet.bandcamp.com/album/here-s-the-thing-produced-by-nineteen-ninety-nix-ep
DITCD.COM.credits:
released August 1, 2025
All songs produced / composed/ arranged & all instruments played by Nineteen Ninety Nix.
All song lyrics written & performed by davepsy, except on tracks 3 and 5, also written and performed by Casual and Grafh, respectively.
Mixed & mastered by Mischa Chillak.
Cover artwork by Cookiez.

DITCD.COM.title: LORDINI
DITCD.COM.about:
Get The Digital Here
grimmoses.bandcamp.com/album/lordini
This Album is About coming into realization and working out your vision.
"Lordini" represents an Alchemical transformation from a base metal to the philosopher's stone.
From the setting of focus to the psychological and social understandings of working the industry. To becoming your own independent expression without form and knowing every creation is from a divine source of experience. - Grim

released August 17, 2024
Beat Production provided by ARTLORDS: Al Wonder, DJ Benoit and Thelonious Coltrane
Mix/Master/Art at GGR/C Ghost Gun Records
Executive Producer Grim Moses

DITCD.COM.title: Roc Builders 2
DITCD.COM.about:
Fourth project by producer/emcee and father and son duo M Doc Diego and GNyce aka DJ Greg Nyce. Greg Nyce is a pioneer in Rochester New York. With experience in DJing, recording, mixing and much more. Who's worked with Eto, Spesh, Rob Gates, Bo$$ Money Click, and much more. M Doc Diego has worked with many talented producers such as Manzu Beatz, Masta Conga, Kheyzine, Sinamatik, and much more. As well as collaborating with elite emcees such as Bubs Styles, G Fam Black, Mac, Napoleon Da Legend, RhymeStyleTroop, Indigo Pheonyx, and many more.
With the second installment of the Roc Builders series Roc Builders 2. They bring chemistry and a musical bond that's well felt in the Underground. Fully produced by GNyce with M Doc on the microphone as well as executive producing and curating this art piece.
Roc Builders 2 features Slik Jack, Indian Boy, Coach "Build" Parsells, Hassaan Mackey, Crotona P, Mike Titan, Kill - Her Kam, Sauce Yin, Piff Penny, G Fam Black, Barbaric, Alvarez Masterminded, Isis Aset, Mr. Ripley, Diego Dollaz, Nature Boi, Curtis Coke, Jae Hussle, Azariah, Street Da' Villan, Leo CaSeeNo, Stiggz Stigalo, Euphony Bars, JFliz, Volatile, Cvere, Brogawd, and Vic Monroe. Mastered by Grammy Award Winning producer/engineer Roc Solid Atl. Artwork by Mosiqu Grfx. Available on bandcamp and all streaming platforms June 15th.

DITCD.COM.title: The Black Swan
DITCD.COM.about:
Indigo Phoenyx and Adwerdz collaborate on a sinister cinematic soundtrack titled Black Swan . The project concept is loosely based on the psychological thriller Black Swan a film about an aspiring ballerina that spirals out of control for her moment in the spotlight.
The dance swan lake features a beautiful white swan turned from ugly duckling. The Black Swan symbolizes the dark side of one's mind when it comes to competition, feelings of inadequacy and the need for validation. Indigo translates her experiences in life and the music industry in these same scenarios and weaves a tale of feeling alone, counted out but then finding her stride. Sometimes it takes a few knives in your back to make you realize your energy is misplaced. Adwerdz has a bold beat curation style that compliments Indigo’s gritty lyrics. He has a grasp on captivating drums and perfectly laced sampling that have a major head nod factor while evoking emotions. Black Swan is a testimony of mastering your craft through practice and elite execution when it’s time to show up!
Digital Here:
indigophoenyx.bandcamp.com/album/the-black-swan
DITCD.COM.credits:
released February 3, 2025
Produced by Adwerdz
Written /Performed by Indigo Phoenyx
Mix/Mastered by Adwerdz
Art by Indy
Rugged triad Records

DITCD.COM.title: Year Of The Ox
DITCD.COM.about:
Year Of The Ox, the new album by legendary MC Matt Maddox is being released exclusively on CD with  DITCD.COM.  The CD comes beautifully packaged in a digipack with a 4 panel insert that folds out into a mini poster. The album features Ruste Juxx, Copywrite, Earl Hazard and more!! With production by Nohokai, Camoflauge Monk, Dark Arts and a slew of others!! This project is extremely limited and the only way to hear the album is to cop the CD!!
DO NOT PIRATE THIS ALBUM!!
